---
id: get-attachments
title: "Get attachments by API attachment key"
description: "Get attachments by API attachment key. Only returns attachments that have not been associated with content."
sidebar_label: "Get attachments by API attachment key"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: api/xenforo-api
custom_edit_url: null
hide_send_button: true
---

import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get attachments by API attachment key"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/attachments/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get attachments by API attachment key. Only returns attachments that have not been associated with content.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"key","in":"query","description":"The API attachment key","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}},{"name":"XF-Api-User","in":"header","description":"User ID to execute the request as. Requires a super user API key.","schema":{"type":"integer"}},{"name":"api_bypass_permissions","in":"query","description":"Whether or not to bypass the context user permissions. Requires a super user API key.","schema":{"type":"boolean"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}

Requires XF-Request-User header to be non-zero.","schema":{"type":"string"}}},"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"attachments":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"filename":{"type":"string"},"file_size":{"type":"integer"},"height":{"type":"integer"},"width":{"type":"integer"},"thumbnail_url":{"type":"string"},"retina_thumbnail_url":{"type":"string"},"direct_url":{"type":"string"},"is_video":{"type":"boolean"},"is_audio":{"type":"boolean"},"attachment_id":{"type":"integer"},"content_type":{"type":"string"},"content_id":{"type":"integer"},"attach_date":{"type":"integer"},"view_count":{"type":"integer"}},"title":"Attachment"},"description":"List of matching attachments."}}}}}},"default":{"description":"Error","headers":{"XF-Latest-Api-Version":{"description":"The latest API version available.","schema":{"type":"integer"}},"XF-Used-Api-Version":{"description":"The API version used to render the response.","schema":{"type":"integer"}},"XF-Request-User":{"description":"The user ID of the request user.","schema":{"type":"integer"}},"XF-Request-User-Extras":{"description":"Additional information about the request user in JSON encoding. >
